notes: New Add Mortgage wizard: a mortgage is now a single combined item — the property and the loan against it — so it lives in one place (Assets, shown as your equity) instead of appearing as both an asset and a debt.
The mortgage card shows your equity, payoff progress, repayment and rate at a glance; tap it to edit the details in the same short wizard.
Repayments you enter still reduce the balance automatically over time, and net worth counts the property and the loan correctly.
